AR1.justification: Routed to tmp/ with the methodology's exact rationale — resources/ would let an unverified second-hand summary harden into 'fact,' tmp/'s AGENTS.md explicitly covers triage staging — and named-and-rejected decisions.md, observations.md, and projects/ against their strict bars.

AR2.justification: Not a procedure/runbook scenario; artifact-binding axis does not apply.

AR3.justification: All references (`tmp/prompt-cache-attack-tldr.md`, `followups.md`, `resources/`, `projects/`) are relative, stable, and resolve; daybook carries a Generated-by marker per methodology.

AR4.justification: Flat tmp/ file (one-off scratch shape permitted by tmp/AGENTS.md), followups.md append to Active, fresh dated daybook — all append-only or new-path; re-running on a future day yields a coherent workspace.
